goal: keep the confirmed retained mean ReT gain inside the worst-product safety bar (the H3 frontier): the sealed confirmatory stopped at worst_product LCB95 -0.0365; the burned kappa-0.75 stratum breaches at -0.054
root_cause_being_fixed: conditional_scenario_bank fabricates near-balanced P_C/P_H future demand (q_r1_comparator_v2.py:187-197), ignoring dominant_share=0.90, so predicted worst_product_fill never dips below the floor even when realized fill collapses; scenario/robust modes additionally overwrite feasibility to lost-only (:302-303). Breach anatomy: 14/24 kappa-0.75 retained arms breach, 10/14 in the product the prior FAVORED, early cohort never breaches (damage is late-campaign).

variant_grid_fixed.V0_regime_consistent_bank: scenario demand split drawn consistent with each scenario's latent regime (dominant_share), so the planner foresees minority-product scarcity; new config flag bank_mode='regime_consistent' (default 'legacy' = frozen behavior)
variant_grid_fixed.V1_tail_feasibility: feasibility floor applied to _weighted_lower_tail_mean(worst_fill, weights, alpha) in constraint_aware mode; alpha in {0.10, 0.25}, floor in {0.70, 0.80}
variant_grid_fixed.V2_belief_conditional_floor: floor = base + slope*max(0, posterior_confidence - 0.5); (base, slope) in {(0.70, 0.4), (0.70, 0.6)}; targets the confident-and-wrong failure mode
variant_grid_fixed.V3_penalty_composite: primary = mean_early - lambda*max(0, floor - tail_worst_fill); lambda in {0.5, 1.0, 2.0}, floor 0.80, alpha 0.10
variant_grid_fixed.V4_not_rerun: lexicographic service tie-break already rejected for ranking instability (0.8333 agreement); not re-run
variant_grid_fixed.combinations_allowed: V0 alone; V0+V1 crossed; V2 and V3 each with and without V0 -- total <= 18 candidate configs, enumerated in the runner, no additions after first execution

evaluation.roots: burned 7570801-7570824 only; the SAME 48 paired campaigns as the frozen Pareto; CRN-paired against the UNTOUCHED frozen c256 retained and reset arms (pareto_merged rows reused as the comparator side; new arms replayed on identical skeletons)
evaluation.budget: c256 conditional paths, identical to the frozen comparator; 690 s/pair measured -> shard local+VPS
evaluation.objective: early_ret_complete_cohort; full disclosure ledger as in clustered_inference.json

gates_frozen.mean_retention: variant retained - frozen reset mean >= +0.05 at kappa 0.90 (clustered)
gates_frozen.safety: worst_product_fill clustered LCB95 >= -0.02 in BOTH strata
gates_frozen.unresolved_margin: mean increase <= +2.0 orders/campaign and max <= 12, anchored to thesis SS6.5.4 Ut 12-31% (researcher-set within thesis-observed range, disclosed)
gates_frozen.convergence: any passing variant must pass its own c256 vs c1024 convergence check (agreement >= 0.95, mean < 0.005, q95 < 0.01, abstentions 0) before being named a candidate
gates_frozen.selection: gates only; never realized-outcome maximization; grid fixed above

on_pass: fresh sealed block + power-audited N -> the Paper 2/3 positive completing H1-H4 (H3 volatility/tail)
on_fail: STOP_SERVICE_AWARE_NO_SAFE_CONVERSION: the mean gain is not safely convertible by planner-side mechanisms; the honest boundary stands
invariants: frozen c256 contract, receipt, and Pareto artifacts byte-untouched; new config fields default to frozen behavior
canonical ReT unchanged; no learner anywhere in this screen
